system_settings.title: System Settings
system_settings.description: Internal configuration states and initialization flags

seeded.description: Indicates whether the database has been initially seeded

blog_post.title: Blog Post
blog_post.description: A blog post item in the CMS system

content.description: The main markdown or text content of the post

excerpt.description: A short highlight or snippet of the post

readTime.description: Estimated reading duration, eg '3 min read'

status.description: Status of the blog post, indicating if it is published or a draft

blog_image.title: Blog Image
blog_image.description: An image document containing the base64 payload and MIME mapping

base64.description: The base64 encoded dataUrl of the image

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the image, e.g. image/jpeg

blog_posts/{postId}.description: Global collection containing all published blog articles

blog_images/{imageId}.description: Separate optimized image storage to bypass document size and query limits

system_settings/{settingsId}.description: General system configuration and seeding flags
